sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109294" key="u(posfuri/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσφῡρίζομαι</orth>, (<sense id="n109294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σφῦρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:11:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cover in the seed when sown</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπαρόω</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:145" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.145</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
